_comments.cookies-health-check: TODO when off Hobby: change to "0 * * * *" (hourly)
_comments.campaign-worker: TODO when off Hobby: change to per-minute
_comments.rate-limit-reset: Must run at 00:00 UTC — zeroes daily caps. If this fails caps stay tripped and outreach freezes.
_comments.proxy-health-check: Every 6h — pings each proxy via api.ipify.org and flags failed ones.
_comments.account-health-monitor: Every 6h offset 30m from proxy check — probes 20 oldest accounts via VPS.
